title: LOPYXBR 18 PCS Plastic Plates and Bowls Sets, Camping Plates and Bowls Set, Unbreakable Dinner Set for 6, Lightweight Dinnerware Sets for Camping, Picnic, Party, Microwave and Dishwasher Safe
features: Package Included: You will recieve plastic plates and bowls set of 6 and 6 cups, which have 6 colors: beige, pink, yellow, orange, dark blue, and dark green. This excellent colorful plastic dinner set is worth for you, making your meals more colorful and appetizing with them!

Lightweight and Sturdy: Made of high quality plastic, the camping plates and bowls set is sturdy and durable, and not easy to break or chip like porcelain or ceramic. Our unbreakable dinner set for 6 is lightweight, and convenient for you to carry out

Microwave & Dishwasher Safe: Our unbreakable dinner set for 6 is microwave safe and dishwasher safe, which can be placed in the microwave for a few minutes to assist in heating food. In addition, our plastic dinner set is stackable, and can save your space

Stackable Design: With a smooth rounded edges, our lightweight dinnerware sets for camping are safe for use and easy to stack compactly without taking up kitchen cabinets too much space. Thanks to the flat bottom, the plastic dinner set is not easy to collapse when stacked

Wide Application: This unbreakable camping plates and bowls set is perfect for daily dining, picnics, camping and parties. They are also suitable for serving pasta, sandwiches, buttered bread, desserts, soups, rice, salads, appetizers, drinks at home, school, office
description: Product Description Introducing the LOPYXBR 18 pcs plastic plates and bowls sets, the durable and wonderful kitchen container, worthy of your choice! Our camping plates and bowls set suitable for serving pasta, sandwiches, buttered bread, desserts, soups, rice, salads, appetizers, drinks at home, office! Specification: Bowl Size: 14.7x7.2 cm/5.78x2.83 inch Diameter of the Dish: 22.5 cm/8.85 inch Cup Size: 8.3x10.7 cm/3.26x4.2 inch Material: Plastic 6 Colors: beige, pink, yellow, orange, dark blue, and dark green Package Included: 18 PCS Maximum temperature that can be tolerated: 400 °C Wonderful Color: The colorful set of tableware will brighten up your eyes, make food more appetizing, take pictures or videos will make your artwork look better. This set includes 6 plates, 6 bowls, 6 cups with 6 colors, and can accommodate 6 people enjoy meals together. Each family member can choose a specific color they like, perfect larger size for all family members or any age. Unbreakable: The unbreakable plastic dinner set，unbreakable even when dropped or hit ensuring your safe use.
